response.overview: Experience the laughter and joy with 'Me Suena', a hilarious comedy directed by the talented Hugo Varela. This DVD is brand new and still sealed, ensuring you receive a pristine copy for your collection. Enjoy this comedic treasure in Spanish, perfect for family movie nights or gatherings with friends. With a single disc, the movie delivers a clear SD video resolution for an enjoyable viewing experience. Don't miss your chance to own this original masterpiece!  Produced by Kino, this title is an essential addition to any comedy fan’s collection.
response.title: Me suena
